title: The Rooftop Battle Turns Desperate
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Yamato, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kaido, Big Mom as The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.
scene: The rooftop battle turns desperate as Luffy falls and Zunesha links his return to Joy Boy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Just hold on a little longer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hamlet, we need to get out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: wanda, Garrot, let's go back into the dome!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We don't wanna get thrown off the edge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is this island going to hold?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, you're still alive down there, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Done Interior, fromTal Lobe Floor - Beast Pirates' Bath

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a commotion!! That shock- wave was insane!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Traffy and the others must've taken down big mom....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's happening with the fire?! I hope usopp and the rest are okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, ZEUS!! Who matters more now? Me or Big Mom?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hihmaru, Komachyo, you two were amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WAAH!! You do Nani of course!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They'll be alright-yoi. Just watch out for the debris raining down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We can't drop our guards yet...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This island is still the most dangerous place on the planet-yo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... no, we've done our part..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even if Kaido is the one...

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
